fontSubstitution: The source references nine missing 1CamBam Stick fonts. Validation replaces them with the supplied Pixels Medium TTF in both Blender and GN-VM, with embedded outlines as the browser fallback.
validation: All five Blender sweep cases match exactly in vertices, faces, and four-decimal bounds: authored 11,971 / 11,199, NODE DOJO 13,242 / 12,432, peak height 11,971 / 11,199, line thickness 9,591 / 8,855, and subdivide 12 at 3,971 / 3,548. The guide follows Blender 5.1's float32 Poly tangent calculation, minimum-twist normal transport, full-precision tilt, independent normal resampling, and left-associated quaternion multiplication. All 56 aligned guide-quaternion components are bit-exact. Re-extracting the supplied Pixels Medium TTF without seven-decimal atlas rounding makes all 792 centered-glyph and realized proximity-target coordinate components bit-exact while retaining the established touching-cell contour topology. The matched-font authored capture restores chrome.002 against Blender's bundled studio.exr and uses surface-only camera bounds. Its full viewport comparison reaches 0.841792 silhouette IoU; the residual is dominated by the browser's intentional 156-segment guide-wire overlay, absent from Blender's isolated render, plus Eevee-versus-Three reflection and raster differences.

materialParity.roughAttribute: missing values resolve to zero, producing the authored polished metal
materialParity.environment: Blender bundled CC0 studio.exr at 0.8 strength
